label: ABAP Objects & Core ABAP
desc: ABAP Objects, classes, constructors, internal concepts, memory, conversions, indexes, and core ABAP statements

label: ABAP on SAP HANA
desc: SAP HANA basics, CDS views, AMDP, Open SQL, code-to-data, HANA Studio, and migration checks

label: ABAP Workbench & AMDP
desc: ABAP Workbench tools, repository objects, transports, function groups, BADIs, and AMDP development

label: Data Transfer
desc: BDC, batch input sessions, LSMW, GUI upload, application server files, and data migration methods

label: Data Dictionary
desc: SE11, database tables, domains, data elements, views, lock objects, search helps, indexes, and table settings

label: Enhancements & BADIs
desc: Enhancement framework, implicit and explicit enhancement points, enhancement spots, BADIs, and implementations

label: SAP Forms
desc: SAPscript, Smart Forms, Adobe Forms, windows, output media, debugging, graphics, and form processing

label: Internal Tables
desc: Internal table declarations, table types, sorting, deleting, field catalogs, ALV filters, and table operations

label: OData, SAPUI5 & Fiori
desc: OData services, Gateway, HTTP methods, annotations, CDS exposure, Fiori apps, Launchpad, and UI5 concepts

label: Reporting & ALV
desc: Classical reports, ALV grid, containers, events, variants, field catalogs, layout, and display methods

label: Web Dynpro ABAP
desc: Web Dynpro components, views, controllers, context binding, UI elements, layouts, plugs, and ALV integration

label: Final 150 Questions
desc: Separate final ABAP 150-question mixed-topic practice set; duplicates are allowed only in this final topic
